title: 12 Pieces Spare Silicone Sealant Nozzles, Silicone Tube Nozzles Resealable Sealant Nozzle with 12 Pcs Red Caulk Cap Covers for Bathroom Kitchen Finishing Sealing
features: 【Package Includes】You will get 12 pcs silicone tube nozzles with caps, sufficient in quantity and complete in combination to satisfy your demands on using and replacing in daily life.
【Premium Material】The silicone nozzle attachment made of quality plastic, the red lid is not easy to fade or break, reliable and serviceable, and can serve you for a long time.
【Thread Design】The mastic nozzles are designed with standard size thread, easy to install and tighten, but not easy to fall off.
【Practical Way】These silicone caulking nozzles can help guide the glue to be discharged steadily when you work, and the air tight lid can avoid adhesives flowing out or hardening inside the nozzle.

【Wide Applications】These silicone sealant nozzles are very suitable for many occasions, such as sealing doors and windows, caulking floor and ceiling, sealing crevices on the corner and plumbs caulk and other occasions.
description: Product Description Features This caulk nozzle kit is made of good quality plastic, durable and reusable. Plastic sealant tool adopts the standard size of thread design, easy to install and tighten, but not easy to fall off. Suitable for silicone caulking tubes, applied as installation tools for doors and windows, such as repairing gaps, wall tiles, floor tiles and floors Specifications Material: Plastic Color: White, Red Tube Size: 10.6 * 1.9cm/4.17 * 0.748in Cap Size: 4.5 * 1.3cm/1.77 * 0.512in desktop Effectively fill the gaps in the desktop bathroom Makes the toilet’s contact with the bathroom floor firmer kitchen Prevent water leaks from the edge of the vegetable sink floor So that the ground gap is filled, it is not easy to accommodate dirt
